name: Soupe Aux Pois Beauceons (Pea Soup, Beauce Style)
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Salted herbs, rinsed in cold water only
1/4 cup Smoked ham, plus ham bone
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak peas for at least 8 hours or overnight in water to cover; drain.
2. Heat butter in a large, heavy pot and sauté onion and leek until tender.
3. Add peas, ham, salt pork (in one piece), garlic, water, and salted herbs.
4. Bring quickly to a boil, lower heat, partly cover, and cook gently for 2 to 3 hours or until peas are tender. Stir occasionally during cooking, adding more water if necessary.
5. Remove salt pork, cut into small pieces, then return to soup.
6. May be frozen.
